arts.ttl: Tottenham could break unwanted club record in West Ham clash as Premier League worst looms for Ange Postecoglou
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur could write a new chapter of unwanted club history when they travel to West Ham United for Sunday's Premier League London derby.

arts.ttl: Tottenham Predicted Lineup vs. West Ham: Premier League
arts.sum: How Tottenham could line up for their Premier League clash away at West Ham on Sunday afternoon.

arts.ttl: West Ham fans call for Graham Potter to be SACKED after controversial remark about Tottenham ahead of this weekend's clash with their London rivals
arts.sum: Potter has been feeling the pressure in recent weeks, with West Ham 17th in the table amid a dire run of results, and he failed to keep his composure in his post-match press conference last week.

arts.ttl: Tottenham lineup vs. West Ham: Predicted XI for Premier League London derby after triple injury blow

arts.ttl: West Ham lineup vs. Tottenham: Predicted XI for Premier League London derby
